display.purpose: Major score displays and hero section headings. Used sparingly.

display-sm.purpose: Section titles, patient names, pre-appointment summary headings.

body.purpose: Standard content, AI insight text, journal reflections. Max 68ch.

micro.purpose: Status tags, category labels, badge text. Always uppercase at this size.

mono.purpose: Every numeric value in the interface: scores, timestamps, deltas, statistical values.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Default card shadow. Present at rest. Distinguishes card from page background.

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: Hover state on interactive cards, focused input fields, sticky nav on scroll.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, floating panels, modals. Reserved for elements that truly layer above the page.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and hover effects.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Opacity, color transitions. Default for most interactive state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action. Used for primary patient actions (submit check-in, save) and provider actions (generate summary, send SMS).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #FAFAF8; background: #0F6E56; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), opacity 120ms, transform 80ms; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.88; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1D9E75; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-priority actions. Used for secondary/cancel actions alongside a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #5F5E5A; background: #F4F2ED; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12); cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 120ms, transform 80ms; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { opacity: 0.88; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1D9E75; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Badge — Stable
components.description: Communicates stable trend or positive status. Always paired with text, never color-only.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 20px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-badge-stable { background: #E1F5EE; color: #04342C; } .ds-badge-watch { background: #FAEEDA; color: #854F0B; } .ds-badge-decline { background: #FCEBEB; color: #A32D2D; } .ds-badge-neutral { background: #EDEBE6; color: #5F5E5A; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary content container. Resting shadow at rest; lifted shadow on hover for interactive cards.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FAFAF8; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(26,26,24,0.05), 0 1px 3px rgba(26,26,24,0.04); transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(26,26,24,0.08), 0 4px 16px rgba(26,26,24,0.05); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field. Focus state activates reed-green border and lifted shadow.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #5F5E5A; } .ds-input { background: #FAFAF8; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #1A1A18; outline: none; transition: border-color 120ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #888780; } .ds-input:focus { border: 1.5px solid #0F6E56; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(26,26,24,0.08), 0 4px 16px rgba(26,26,24,0.05); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Score Cell
components.description: Compact score display used in the 2-column score grid. Label in Fieldnote Mist, value in JetBrains Mono.
components.html:
Stability Score
7.4
components.css: .ds-score-cell { background: #FAFAF8; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 12px; } .ds-score-cell-label { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; color: #888780; margin-bottom: 3px; } .ds-score-cell-val { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: #1A1A18; } .ds-score-cell-track { height: 2px; background: #EDEBE6; border-radius: 1px; overflow: hidden; margin-top: 6px; } .ds-score-cell-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 1px; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top navigation. Patient variant with 11 items; collapses to hamburger below 768px.
components.html:
CSCognaSync
HomeCheck-InJournal
components.css: .ds-nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 52px; background: #FAFAF8; border-bottom: 1px solid #1A1A18; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 28px; gap: 0; z-index: 1000; box-shadow: none; transition: box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-nav-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-right: 32px; flex-shrink: 0; text-decoration: none; } .ds-brand-mark { background: #1A1A18; color: #FAFAF8; font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-size: 12px; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 2px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-brand-name { font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-size: 16px; color: #1A1A18; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0; } .ds-nav-item { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #5F5E5A; text-decoration: none; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; transition: color 120ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #1A1A18; } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #0F6E56; }

narrative.overview:
CognaSync looks like data kept by a thoughtful person, not generated by software. The aesthetic owes something to a well-worn researcher's notebook: warm paper tones, editorial serif type alongside precise monospaced numbers, ink-dark text on parchment surfaces. Every screen carries the sense that someone cared enough to record this carefully.

The system holds two audiences with different needs on the same visual plane. Patient surfaces breathe more, let the serif work, make space for the human dimension of tracking. Provider surfaces compress, structure, flag, and get out of the way.

This system explicitly rejects generic SaaS dashboards (hero metrics, identical card grids, gradient number callouts, navy sidebars) and clinical EHR software (cold white forms, sterile field grids, the thing that makes a patient feel like a record number).
keyCharacteristics: Warm parchment surfaces with ink-dark text; teal reserved for actionable elements only
DM Serif Display for names, scores, and section titles; DM Sans for everything else; JetBrains Mono for every number
Structured shadow vocabulary: surfaces feel placed, not floating
Tactile interactions: micro-feedback on press, opacity transitions on hover
Status communicates through color + label together; color alone is never the signal
No side-stripe borders, no gradient text, no SaaS hero-metric templates

rules.name: The Reed Rule
rules.body: Teal is the only brand color. Amber, red, and notation blue are semantic signals, not accent options. If a new element needs color and it is not communicating status, it uses teal or a neutral.

rules.name: The No-White Rule
rules.body: Neither #fff nor #000 appears anywhere. Every surface is #FAFAF8 or warmer. Every text is #1A1A18 or lighter.

rules.name: The Mono Number Rule
rules.body: Every score, delta, timestamp, or computed value renders in JetBrains Mono. No exceptions.

rules.name: The Weight Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Maximum font weight is 500. Hierarchy comes from scale contrast, font-family contrast, and opacity. Never from bold weight.

rules.name: The Warm Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows use rgba(26,26,24,...) not rgba(0,0,0,...). A cold black shadow on a warm parchment surface reads as a mistake.

rules.name: The State-Responsive Rule
rules.body: Cards carry the Resting shadow at rest. Lifted shadow appears only in response to hover, focus, or scroll state. Elevated shadow is reserved for elements that truly float above the page surface.

dos: Do use rgba(26,26,24,...) for all shadows. Warm tint, never pure black.
Do render every numeric value in JetBrains Mono.
Do use DM Serif Display for display headings, section anchors, and score labels.
Do pair every status color signal with a text label.
Do apply transform: scale(0.98) on button active/press states.
Do keep body line length at 65-75ch.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe. The current .cs-insight side-stripe pattern is deprecated.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard patterns: hero-metric cards, gradient accents, identical card grids, navy-sidebar chrome.
Don't make the interface feel like clinical EHR software: cold white form fields, sterile field grids.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient).
Don't apply semantic colors (amber, red, notation blue) decoratively.
